titleStmt.title: SII 19.210: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 210. (A.R. No. 204 of 1926.) ON THE WEST WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE.

summary.p: This inscription fixes the details of daily expenditure in paddy towards the pōnagam offerings to the god, a dīpamālā of 16 lamps to be burnt both morning and evening, a rice offering to god Brahmā and a twilight lamp, in the temple of Tirupperunduṟai-Mahādēva to be met out of the 30 kalam of paddy derived annualy from the dēvadāna village of Puṉṟagai in Poygai-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakesaripanmaṟkku yāṇṭu 8- Āva
tu Ārkkāṭṭukūṟṟattu brahmadeyam ca
ntralekai caturvetimaṅkalattu tirupperuntuṟai
mahādevarkku tevatāṉam poykaināṭṭu
puṉṟakaiyil nel Āḷvār Amutuceyumpaṭi paya
ṟṟuppoṉakattukku tiruvamutuarici Irunāḻiyurikku nel
lu kuṟuvāḷkūli Eṟṟi Añciraṇṭuvaṇṇattāl Aṟunāḻiuḻak
kum tūpparuppu nāṭurikku payaṟu � Iru nāḻikku nellu nāḻi paya
ṟṟukku muṉnāḻi Āka nellu Aṟunāḻi neyyamutu Āḻākkukku
nellu nāṉāḻiyum caṟkkaraiamutu Uḻakku nellu Irunāḻi Uriyum po
rikkaṟikku nellu muḻākkum viṟakukku nellu nāḻiyum Āka nicatappaṭi nellu
patakku nāṉāḻi Uriāka Orāṭṭaināḷaikku nellu 7 1000 6 100 � ciṟukā
laisandhiyil dipamālai 10 6 viḷakkeṟṟa Eṇṇai �yum Antiyam(p)
potai sandhiyil tipamālai 10 6 viḷakkeṟṟa Eṇṇai �yum Āka nicatam
eṇṇai � nāḻikku nellu na tūṇi vaṇṇamāka
ōrāṭṭaināḷaikku nellu 100 2 10ḷa nūṟṟirupatin kalamum
brahmarkku Oru sandhi tiruvamutu Arici 2pa Iru nāḻikku nellu
aññāḻiyum kaṟiyamutukku nellu nāḻiyum sandhivi
ḷak keṟṟa Eṇṇaikku nellu Irunāḻiyum Āka nicatamum
kuṟuṇiyāka Ōrāṭṭaināḷaikku nellu 3 10 ḷa .
Digital edition of SII 19.210 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
